input.headline: REI’s biggest sale of the year is here — I found 51 great deals worth shopping

raw.headline: REI’s biggest sale of the year is here — I found 51 great deals worth shopping

winner: Why did the REI shopper bring a magnifying glass? To find the one deal among the 51 that's actually on sale!

candidates.text: REI's biggest sale of the year is here—I finally found a reason to go outside.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'found a reason to go outside' add unexpected humor while tying back to the sale context."}

candidates.text: Why did the shopper go to REI's sale? Because they heard there were 51 reasons to find a great deal!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties directly to the headline with a play on '51 reasons,' but it's slightly generic and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: When asked about REI's biggest sale, a shopper replied, "Well, I couldn't find any of their 'great deals worth shopping', but I did manage to sell 51 items they weren't looking to buy!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific with a clever twist on the headline's claims."}

candidates.text: Why did the REI shopper bring a magnifying glass? To find the one deal among the 51 that's actually on sale!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific to the headline but relies on a generic setup (magnifying glass) and a mild twist. It's not particularly surprising or funny, and the humor feels a bit forced."}

candidates.text: Why did the shopper bring 51 friends to REI's sale? Because they heard it was a "group" effort to find great deals!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat forced and relies on a weak pun ('group' effort). It connects to the headline but lacks surprise and specificity."}
